message:
test(franken_kernel): comprehensive unit + proptest suite (bd-1usdh.4)

92 unit tests + 5 doc-tests covering all franken_kernel types:

- TraceId/DecisionId: 10k monotonic ordering, Display/FromStr/serde
  roundtrips (10k iterations), hash consistency, bytes roundtrip, edge cases
- PolicyId: ordering, serde, hash consistency
- SchemaVersion: comprehensive ordering (1.0.0 < 1.0.1 < 1.1.0 < 2.0.0),
  0.x edge cases, compatibility (reflexive/symmetric), copy semantics
- Budget: tropical semiring laws (commutativity, associativity, identity,
  idempotent), consume additivity, exact/zero/insufficient edge cases
- Cx: 10-level attenuation chain, budget monotonicity through nesting,
  trace propagation, child budget capping, custom CapabilitySet
- Send + Sync static assertions for all public types
- proptest: hash consistency, budget semiring laws, Cx invariants,
  SchemaVersion compatibility transitivity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
